1A.6.note: All 112 operations generated from Smithy model via per-language generators

1B.2.note: Request/response types generated from OpenAPI schema, not hand-constructed

1B.4.note: Optional fields use pointers (Go), optional (TS/Swift/Kotlin), nilable (Ruby)

1B.5.note: ISO 8601 date strings used for all timestamp fields

1C.1.note: All API paths verified against Fizzy routes.rb

1C.3.note: All paths generated from OpenAPI spec; no manual fmt.Sprintf or string interpolation for paths

2A.6.note: Error bodies truncated to 10KB in all languages

2D.5.note: Resilience patterns isolated per-client instance, not per-operation

3A.4.note: OAuth PKCE deferred — Fizzy does not implement OAuth

3A.5.note: OAuth PKCE deferred — Fizzy does not implement OAuth

3A.6.note: Token auto-refresh deferred — Fizzy uses session tokens, not refresh tokens

3C.2.note: Response body limited to 10MB in all languages

3C.3.note: Error messages truncated to prevent unbounded memory

3C.4.note: Authorization and Cookie headers redacted in all logging hooks

4B.5.note: All 112 operations have corresponding conformance tests (127 test cases across 4 runners)

4C.4.note: Release workflows are idempotent; Go sub-tag creation checks for existing tags
